title: What Are You Voting For? 2023
description: Adds the mobs from the 2023 Minecraft Mob Vote (Crab, Armadillo and Penguin) to the game early!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MmALiFwH/images/96af4e06b64caa5d93da69f3fae7885d6824ddb5.png) **The Minecraft Mob Vote is back, and that only means one thing: What Are You Voting For? is returning for 2023!**
If you aren’t familiar with my What Are You Voting For? mods, they’re mods that add all of the Mob Vote’s contestants into the game as accurately as possible before the vote even starts, so you can get a better idea of what you’re actually voting for!
**The mobs in this year’s Mob Vote, and What Are You Voting For?, are the Crab, Armadillo, and the Penguin!**
**There are versions of the mod for both Minecraft 1.20.1 and 1.19.2!**  
If you like the mod, please share it everywhere you can, so as many people as possible can see the mobs in-game!

**Made By**

If you like my mods, you might want to join my **[Discord server](https://discord.gg/5SU6vnW8Ke)**!  
If you like my mods and want to support me, consider **[becoming a patron](https://www.patreon.com/alexandersfunandgames?fan_landing=true)**, it’s really appreciated! Patrons also get access to some cool rewards, like access to WIP builds of my mods!  
 
### [Mojang Studios’ introduction to the Mob Vote](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O6sXlEwSy1I)  
## About the mobs: If a feature is surrounded by * *, it means the feature hasn’t been confirmed for the mob, but had to be added to this mod. If a feature is surrounded by ** **, it means the feature was heavily implied for the mob, but wasn’t explicitly confirmed.
Crab [Mojang Studios’ introduction to the Crab](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qElvTW-8-W8)


Crabs are found in Mangrove Swamps, \*and are slightly rarer than Frogs.* they’re able to climb up blocks, similarly to Spiders.


\*The Crab’s left claw comes in three different sizes: small, medium, and large. This claw grows over time, increasing in size at a random time between 5 and 10 minutes.* \*\*Crabs occasionally wave their left claws.** \*when a Crab with a full size claw waves, it has a 1 in 30 chance to drop the claw (revealing a small claw underneath), claws dropped by Crabs only stay on the ground for a minute, so you’ll have to be quick if you want to get your hands on one!* Crab Claws can be held to increase the maximum distance you can build at \*by 2 blocks. Every time a Crab Claw is used to build further away, it loses 1 durability, it has 100 durability in total and can’t be repaired.*

\*Crabs can’t be bred.*
 
Armadillo [Mojang Studios’ introduction to the Armadillo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jNTufMgx6eM&t=1s)


Armadillos are found in Savannas, \*they’re rare, and only spawn in groups of one.*


Armadillos get scared easily, and will curl up into a ball when frightened. \*\*Curled up Armadillos are solid like blocks, ** \*take massively reduced damage, and are immune to arrows.* Things that scare Armadillos are: . \*Monsters* . \*Mobs that aren’t monsters (Armadillos calm down even if the mobs stay near them)* . \*Getting hurt (scares nearby Armadillos too)* . \*Players walking without crouching* . \*Players turning too quickly* . \*Players falling more than 0.6 blocks*

\*Armadillos can be tempted and bred using Eggs.* \*When a baby Armadillo grows up, it drops an Armadillo Scute.*

\*4* Armadillo Scutes can be used to craft Wolf Armour, which can be equipped to a tamed Wolf \*using the use button (right-click by default), and can be removed by crouching and using the use button on the Wolf with an empty hand.*

\*Because of potential confusion between Scutes and Armadillo Scutes, Scutes have been renamed to Turtle Scutes.*
 
Penguin [Mojang Studios’ introduction to the Penguin](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sCszdeWTzKs&t=1s)


Penguins are found on Stony Shores, and \*\*swap between being on land and in the water.**


\*\*Penguins are able to move quickly out of the water and leap onto land, but are clumsy when on land, and may trip and fall when hopping down blocks!**


\*\*Penguins occasionally look at mobs and happily flap their wings.** \*\*Penguins occasionally approach and look at Players and other Penguins for a while.** \*Penguins can be bred using Salmon or Cod. After being bred, one of the Penguins will go back to land and lay an egg. The Penguin will then try to sit on the egg until it hatches. Penguin Eggs will only hatch when Penguins are sitting on them. If an egg is left unattended, a nearby Penguin may claim it as its own.*


When using a Boat near Penguins, the Penguins will swarm around the Boat and speed it up!


 
 
[Mojang Studios’ conclusion to the mob introductions](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5GOxXM_HCRM&t=1s)
